analysis.core_story_summary: This austerity commences on the fifth day of the bright half of the hindu month- kartik and lasts for a year whereby a devotee observes fast on the fifth day(bright half) of the every month that follows. It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
audience_notes.teens_13_17: Connect events to decision-making, identity, and consequences.
audience_notes.young_adults_18_30: Highlight ethics, leadership, and social relevance.
audience_notes.devotional_traditional: Preserve sacred framing and theological terms respectfully.
audience_notes.global_general: Keep cultural context brief and avoid insider assumptions.

sensitivity_notes: Mostly suitable for broad audiences with light cultural context.

redesigned_story_by_demographic.children_8_12: **Shanti-Vrata — Kids (8-12):** This austerity commences on the fifth day of the bright half of the hindu month- kartik and lasts for a year whereby a devotee observes fast on the fifth day(bright half) of the every month that follows. It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity. This story teaches actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Think of it like a legend that helps us choose kindness, courage, and respect.
redesigned_story_by_demographic.teens_13_17: **Shanti-Vrata — Teens (13-17):** This austerity commences on the fifth day of the bright half of the hindu month- kartik and lasts for a year whereby a devotee observes fast on the fifth day(bright half) of the every month that follows. It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity. For teens, the key idea is actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. It shows how choices, discipline, and character shape outcomes.

It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity. It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity. redesigned_story_by_demographic.global_general: **Shanti-Vrata — Global General Audience:** This austerity commences on the fifth day of the bright half of the hindu month- kartik and lasts for a year whereby a devotee observes fast on the fifth day(bright half) of the every month that follows. It is related with the worship of lord Vishnu and Sheshnag. A devotee should abstain from hot and spicy food during the course of this austerity. In universal terms, it explores actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Cultural names are preserved while the message is presented in accessible contemporary English.
